categories.definition: Questions collecting height, weight, or BMI data for medical assessment
Questions about current medical conditions, diseases, or health problems
Questions about current prescription medications or medication history
Questions about experienced side effects from medications, including past and current
Questions about previous weight loss attempts, measures taken, or treatment outcomes
Questions about exercise habits, diet, hunger patterns, and lifestyle factors
Questions specifically about blood pressure readings or values
Questions about how long the patient has had weight problems
Questions about medication compliance, dosing, regularity of use, and adherence
Questions about current medication dosage, dose changes, or dosage preferences
Questions requesting upload of full body photos for medical assessment
Questions requesting upload of identity documents or passport photos
Questions requiring patient confirmation of understanding treatment information, risks, and responsibilities
Questions about treatment outcomes, weight loss achieved, or treatment satisfaction
Questions about concurrent weight loss measures taken alongside medication treatment
Questions about new health problems, diagnoses, or changes since last prescription
Informational questions providing guidance on missed doses, interruptions, or dosing instructions
Informational questions providing guidance on managing side effects
